contract.title: The Ash Window
contract.premise: A townhouse window keeps showing tomorrow's fire in yesterday's soot.

evidence_assets.title: Ash lot notice
evidence_assets.public_summary: A notice lists a window frame recovered before the fire.

hidden_truth.summary: The window is a cinder oracle that shows fires before they are set.

artifacts.title: Ash Lot Notice
artifacts.public_summary: A notice lists the window frame as recovered before the fire.
artifacts.full_text: Lot notice: frame recovered from Bellweather House, timestamped two hours before the fire.

artifacts.title: Soot Sample Receipt
artifacts.public_summary: A receipt notes glass soot with an impossible cooling pattern.
artifacts.full_text: Receipt: soot lifted from inner glass. Cooling pattern contradicts the reported fire time.

edges.public_summary: The notice timestamp points toward the soot anomaly.

unlock_rules.award_reason: Followed the ash notice to the soot sample.

allowed_reveal_strings: Residual soot points toward another lead.

rubric_facts.reveal: Residual soot points toward another lead.
